text: Garden Hose pipe is a flexible tube used to convey water. There are a number of common attachments available for the end of the hose, such as sprayers and sprinklers (which are used to concentrate water at one point or spread it over a large area). Garden hose pipe is ideally suited to unlimited applications in a wide range of industries where low pressure work is required for conveyance of water, gardening and other everyday application.

Former Farro Fresh's marketing manager, Ahi McKenzie, has been named as Foodstuffs' new external relations manager. Before Farro, she has been head of marketing and design at The Aromatherapy Company. McKenzie will be working across both Foodstuffs companies, Foodstuffs North Island and Foodstuffs South Island.

A startling novel powerfully displaying dynamics of sin and redemption, working across time. Something odd is happening to John Faversham, a scientifically minded Englishman of the late th century. By chance, he acquires a volume of poems by a minor th century poet, who turns out to have lived in his house. Moreover, one of the poems records a vivid dream which has recently been troubling John. How does be come to share a disturbing dream with a long-dead previous owner of his house? As Anthony Duncan's novel unfolds, we discover the roots of the story in the events of the English Reformation, in the th century. This sometimes startling tale powerfully displays dynamics of sin and redemption, working across time. But the author avoids any easy moralism. The novel is all the more powerful in its compelling depiction of life's knotted fabric, in which good and evil cannot be easily untangled.

Buzz is beginning to grow about Google's plans for a rolling, significant overhaul of how we experience search. Below are the latest pieces which covered the release of semantic search details last week. It's worth noting how these changes might affect rankings and traffic from the search giant in the future.

Prairie Rivers UMC District Office - Hispanic/Latino Ministry - Maria Lopez, diversity counselor from CCC, visits with my English students.
Recibimos muchísima información de las clases, becas y apoyo financiero a CCC (Community College) de María López. Ella es la consejera de la diversidad en Hastings, Grand Island and Columbus. Muchas gracias, María, por venir a mi clase de inglés y por hacer la presentación. ¡Eres una bendición!
We received so much information about classes, scholarships and financial aid at CCC from María López. She is the diversity counselor in Hastings, Grand Island and Columbus. Thank you very much, María, for coming to my English class and for making the presentation. You are a blessing!

Kick off your festive season with Handel's Messiah in St.Catharines' very own Partridge Hall. Experience Chorus Niagara's stirring Hallelujah Chorus as heard by over million people on YouTube, and delight in brilliant soloists who thrill with dazzling arias in this holiday classic. One performance only!
Players: CHORUS NIAGARA, Talisker Players, Jacqueline Woodley, soprano; Stephanie Tritchew, mezzo-soprano; Asitha Tennekoon, tenor; Clarence Frazer, baritone.

Beautiful, modern SOMA Loft embodies the urban live/work lifestyle. Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the unit with natural light . Dramatic high ceilings create an artistic studio feel. Open floor plan with spacious living area opens up to the kitchen with granite countertops and stainless steel appliances. Convenient half-bath on this level. nd level bedroom/bath hovers over the living room, yet feels private. Shared large roof deck with views of Downtown.This Sternberg Benjamin Designed building sits in the middle of SOMA's trendy new coffee houses, restaurants and shops , Walk Score Transit Score. In unit laundry & car parking space.

This IDC Market Note provides an update on forecasts for the hardcopy market in Western Europe.
"Consolidation will be a main theme running through the hardcopy market over the forecast period. The market is declining and there are effectively too many brands chasing fewer sales, so it is inevitable that some of these brands will be acquired or merge over the forecast period. This has been the nature of the hardcopy industry for several years now; this trend will continue and affect small and large brands. This trend will also be seen in the associated print and document management software markets and channel players as a result," said Phil Sargeant, program director, Imaging, Printing, and Document Solutions.
